clue: How many animals are in the Ardougne Zoo?
location: 40, +1 if Eagles' Peak is completed, +1 if Hunt for Red Raktuber is completed

clue: How many bookcases are there in the Varrock Palace library?
How many buildings are in the village?
How many cannons does Lumbridge Castle have?
How many fishermen are there on the Fishing Platform?
How many houses have a cross on the door?
How many people are waiting for the next bard to perform?
How many pigeon cages are there around the back of Jerico's house?
If x is 15 and y is 3 What is 3x + y?
I have 16 kebabs, I eat one myself and share the rest equally between 3 friends. How many do they have each?
What is 19 to the power of 3?
What is 57 x 89 + 23?
How many windows look out into the Citharede Abbey courtyard?
How many bottles are there on the stall to the east of Mr Ex?
solution: 5 before Ritual of the Mahjarrat
location: 5 before Ritual of the Mahjarrat, 3 after Ritual of the Mahjarrat

clue: How many mineable rocks are there in the mine to the south?
How many rocks in the Rimmington mine cannot be used to make bronze?
How many tables are there in the Pick and Lute Inn?
How many banana trees are there in the plantation?
How many flowers are there in the clearing below this platform?
How many gnomes on the gnome ball field have red patches on their uniforms?
A view of the city from high above. I can hear their prayers below.
solution: Go to the top of the Hefin Agility Course.

clue: Being open to Chaos can raise your defences. It may also bring you closer to death. Take a moment to bottle this feeling.
solution: Create a Zamorak brew. (Mix jangerberries into a torstol potion).

clue: Catching only one shark. That don't impress me much.
solution: Catch two sharks at once. Great white sharks count toward the challenge. You can also use a Dwarven fish extractor on the double resources mode. In order for the double catch to count while wearing the fury shark outfit, it must be set to "catch" mode as "consume" will not count.

clue:
Charm me and I shall unlock.
But be brave in the darkness.
solution: Catch a charming moth in the Wilderness, bare-handed.

clue: Corruption seeps from this stone but there are those who work to cleanse it. Lend your voice.
solution: Completely use up a cleansing crystal on the Corrupted Seren Stone. Warning: If you click away early, the clue will not be completed and the cleansing crystal will be lost, forcing you to purchase another.

clue: Crossing the desert I met a crocodile. She gave me a dazzling smile but she had something in her teeth.
solution: Catch a plover bird in the southern part of Sophanem.

clue: Ernie once mentioned to me a secret to improve my cooking. His idea was strong but I went the extra mile.
solution: Add a fire rune to a decorated cooking urn (nr).

clue: Head protection is never a bad thing. Make it from rune for the best chance of survival.
solution: Smith a rune med helm or rune full helm. Note: Neither smithing an elder rune full helm nor smithing a rune full helm +2 will count towards completing this skill challenge.

clue: I have all the ingredients for soup but sometimes a simple meal tastes the best.
solution: Cook a raw shark, raw rocktail or raw sailfish.

clue: In a station of power someone requires assistance. Do a good deed to spread some happiness.
solution: Help Turgall at the Dorgesh-Kaan Agility Course.

clue: I once met a man returning from market. He showed me the spoils of his day. It's precious to see what people pay for.
solution: Steal from the Ardougne Gem Stall.

clue: I once met an ancient warrior who told me tales of his adventures. His eyes lit up as he spoke.
solution: Burn some elder logs.

clue: Keeping all your gold together. That's a good idea. It shall be mine.
solution: Mine a concentrated gold deposit in the Living Rock Caverns.

clue: Magical energy floats unleashed. The fluid of life that flows through us all. Span the gap to capture this energy.
solution: Siphon some blood runes from a blood esswraith, blood pool or bloody skulls in the Runespan.

clue: Round and round we go, burning, burning all aglow.
solution: Burn a curly root in the Jadinko Lair. You must start a firepit, not just add to one.

clue: Rowdy Unruly Boisterous I am pie.
solution: Cook a wild pie or a wilder pie from their raw counterparts.The ingredients for a wild pie are raw bear meat, raw chompy, raw rabbit, and a pie shell. If making a wilder pie, add crushed dragonstone to the raw pie before cooking on a range. This can be done on any range, other than one in a PoH. The Bake Pie spell does work for this skill challenge. A raw wild or wilder pie purchased from the grand exchange does work.

clue: Rumours of a great shark continue to spread. Catch me one and I will be fed.
solution: The easiest way to do this is to buy Great white shark bait from the G.E. then find Goomah at the Fishing Guild and teleport. Lay the bait in one of the swarms and catch a raw great white shark. Otherwise Great White's can be fished at earlier levels at whirlpools and swarm fishing.

clue: Stare into the flames for long enough and you may see something you didn't realise was there.
solution: Burn some magic logs (or corrupted magic logs)

clue: Take the journey to a distant mining site. Become a blight to your foes.
solution: Smelt a Bane bar at a furnace. Any type of bane bar will count. Superheating the bar does not count for this clue.

clue: The crystals tempt most however, there are other riches to gain for the quick-fingered.
solution: Pickpocket any elf.

clue: The God of Order requires a sacrifice of strength but in return restores me. If only we could keep that feeling in his absence.
solution: Create a Saradomin brew. (Mix a crushed bird nest into a toadflax potion.)

clue: The spell struck me in the chest. Perhaps if I had worn armour today. Black looks better than red.
solution: Craft a black dragonhide body.

clue: There are those who prove themselves and become a beacon of light in the darkness. Come to the crystal city and become that figure.
solution: Use Light Form in Prifddinas.

clue: There is a temple where there are rivers of red. Bind the magic to get ahead.
solution: Craft some blood runes. This only works at the Blood Altar in Morytania, not the Ourania Runecrafting Altar.

clue: Those things I once held dear continue to fade. I look upon her face and barely know who she is. But her eyes... They are still so radiant.
solution: Harvest a radiant memory on Dragontooth Island. A Dungeoneering cape can be used to teleport directly to the Dragontooth Island resource dungeon.

clue: When I encountered this individual, she had more rings than any I had seen before.
solution: Cut elder logs off an elder tree. The player-grown elder tree in Prifddinas works for this clue. Receiving elder logs from the polishing perk does not work.

clue: Where there is Light there is also Death. Should you contain this you may progress.
solution: Craft some death runes. This only works at the Death Altar, not the Ourania Runecrafting Altar.
